name: chess-engine-monorepo
description: Local development scripts for running backend and frontend together.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c yellow,cyan "pnpm --dir chess-engine dev" "pnpm --dir chess-engine-frontend dev"
scripts.dev:electron: concurrently -n frontend,electron -c cyan,magenta "pnpm --dir chess-engine-frontend exec vite --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 --strictPort" "pnpm --dir chess-engine-electron dev"
scripts.build:electron: pnpm --dir chess-engine-frontend build && pnpm --dir chess-engine-electron build
